events.event_name: No AI capability event assigned to the v0.3.1 somatic retest wave
events.event_description: This frozen registry records that anx_us_2026w03_somatic_retest is a no-event test-retest reliability wave for the same v0.3.1 construct scope authorized in releases/v0.3.1/manifest.json: the US English online adult somatic_ambient_anxiety construct mean computed from the four approved v0.2.0 somatic and ambient items. The wave is not anchored to a frontier model release, capability demonstration, AI safety incident, labor market announcement, policy action, misinformation or deepfake incident, infrastructure or access change, or any other AI capability shock. Because event_id is fixed to no_event, this registry explicitly prohibits confirmatory or exploratory event-study claims, event-relative exposure claims, causal shock claims, baseline-window claims, follow-up-window claims, and longitudinal trend claims from this retest wave. The registry supports only preregistered repeatability, attrition, panel-conditioning, and longitudinal measurement-invariance evidence for the restricted v0.3.1 somatic and ambient construct.
